title: sedum pallidum subsp. bithynicum
intro: Sedum pallidum subsp. bithynicum, also known as Bithynian stonecrop, is a subspecies of succulent plants in the genus Sedum. It is a type of flowering plant that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. The herbal preparations of Sedum pallidum subsp. bithynicum include infusions, tinctures, and salves that can be used to treat various health conditions.
